---
title: "HW3_Econ144"
author: "Mason Lee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, cache = TRUE)
```

## Packages

```{r}
library(readr)
library(lattice)
library(foreign)
library(MASS)
library(car)
require(stats)
require(stats4)
library(KernSmooth)
library(fastICA)
library(cluster)
library(leaps)
library(mgcv)
library(rpart)
library(pan)
library(mgcv)
library(DAAG)
library("TTR")
library(tis)
require("datasets")
require(graphics)
library(forecast)
require(astsa)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(plotrix)
library(tsibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(USgas)
library(fpp3)
```
